patterns.name: Ascending Triangle
patterns.note: Flat resistance with rising lows; bullish breakout bias.

earnings_basis_divergence.interpretation: Standalone (unconsolidated) EPS for 2025 is 136% ABOVE the consolidated figure — typically a non-recurring parent-level gain or subsidiary dividends. Treat the unconsolidated EPS and any P/E derived from it with caution; the consolidated basis is more conservative.
